mapper.select:
SELECT a.resource_id, a.resource_code, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.resource_version_id, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_d_verid, a.resource_r_verid, a.auth_status, a.publish_time, a.shelf_time, a.unshelf_time, a.publish_portal, b.headers AS toolkit_headers, c.resource_id AS tool_resource_id, c.resource_code AS tool_resource_code, c.system_code AS tool_system_code, c.resource_source_pk_id AS tool_resource_source_pk_id, c.resource_biz_type AS tool_resource_biz_type, c.resource_type AS tool_resource_type, c.resource_name AS tool_resource_name, c.resource_desc AS tool_resource_desc, c.avatar AS tool_avatar, c.sample AS tool_sample, c.tags AS tool_tags, c.resource_version_id AS tool_resource_version_id, c.host_type AS tool_host_type, c.catalog_id AS tool_catalog_id, c.man_org_id AS tool_man_org_id, c.man_user_id AS tool_man_user_id, c.index_list AS tool_index_list, c.create_by AS tool_create_by, c.create_time AS tool_create_time, c.update_by AS tool_update_by, c.update_time AS tool_update_time, c.com_acct_id AS tool_com_acct_id, c.resource_status AS tool_resource_status, c.resource_d_verid AS tool_resource_d_verid, c.resource_r_verid AS tool_resource_r_verid, c.auth_status AS tool_auth_status, c.publish_time AS tool_publish_time, c.shelf_time AS tool_shelf_time, c.unshelf_time AS tool_unshelf_time, c.publish_portal AS tool_publish_portal, d.resource_id AS tool_ext_resource_id, d.path_schema AS tool_path_schema, d.query_schema AS tool_query_schema, d.method AS tool_method, d.input_schema AS tool_input_schema, d.output_schema AS tool_output_schema, d.url AS tool_url, d.url_ori AS tool_url_ori FROM ss_resource a LEFT JOIN ss_res_ext_toolkit b ON a.resource_id = b.resource_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource_rel_detail rel ON a.resource_id = rel.resource_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource c ON rel.rel_resource_id = c.resource_id LEFT JOIN ss_res_ext_tool d ON c.resource_id = d.resource_id WHERE a.resource_biz_type = 'TOOLKIT' AND a.resource_id IN
#{item}
select a.resource_id from ss_resource a join ss_resource_rel_detail b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_biz_type = 'TOOLKIT' and b.rel_resource_id =#{resourceId}
